DEPT. 613: COURT TRIAL ON JAN-22-2002 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED. JUDGE LILLIAN K. SING, CLERK JOSE RIOS-MERIDA, REPORTER CARLITO MANDIA, PLAINTIFF COUNSEL ARNOLD W. EVJE II AND WITNESS SEAN HUGHES PRESENT.
